title: C. elegans
summary: Worm embodiment with aligned sensory and motor channels.
description: Launch the C. elegans Webots world with the alignment profile generated from the AARNN worm assets.

title: Drosophila (BANC)
summary: Fruit-fly embodiment based on the BANC v626 projection.
description: Launch the BANC-derived Drosophila world profile with its generated I/O alignment map.

title: Drosophila (FAFB)
summary: Fruit-fly embodiment based on the FAFB v783 projection.
description: Launch the FAFB-derived Drosophila world profile with its generated I/O alignment map.

title: NAO Robot
summary: Humanoid embodiment with dense visual sensory ingress.
description: Launch the NAO Webots world and inspect the high-bandwidth sensory and actuator profile exported from AARNN.
